title: Method for terminal to operate smart diffuser and terminal therefor
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a method of operating a smart diffuser using a terminal connected to the smart diffuser via a network and a terminal therefor. The method of operating the smart diffuser using the terminal includes generating a mode selection signal comprising operation information on a plurality of oil cartridges mounted in the smart diffuser, wherein the operation information comprises at least one of an operation order, an operation duration, a fragrance emission intensity, and an operation time zone of each of the cartridges; and transmitting the mode selection signal to the smart diffuser. The present disclosure relates to a method of operating a smart diffuser (200) using a terminal (100) connected to the smart diffuser (200) via a network and a terminal therefor. The method of operating the smart diffuser (200) using the terminal (100) includes generating (S 10) a mode selection signal comprising operation information on a plurality of oil cartridges (CA) mounted in the smart diffuser (200), wherein the operation information comprises at least one of an operation order, an operation duration, a fragrance emission intensity, and an operation time zone of each of the cartridges (CA); and transmitting (S20) the mode selection signal to the smart diffuser (200).
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A method of operating a smart diffuser (200) using a terminal (100) connected to the smart diffuser (200) via a network, the method comprising: generating (S10) a mode selection signal comprising operation information on a plurality of oil cartridges (CA) mounted in the smart diffuser (220), wherein the operation information comprises at least one of an operation order, an operation duration, a fragrance emission intensity, and an operation time zone of each of the cartridges (CA); and transmitting (S20) the mode selection signal to the smart diffuser (200). 2. The method of claim 1, wherein the mode selection signal comprises a manual mode selection signal, and the manual mode selection signal is generated based on the operation information on the plurality of oil cartridges (CA), which is input from a user. 3. The method of claim 1 or 2, wherein the mode selection signal comprises a program mode selection signal, and the program mode selection signal is generated based on the operation mode information on the smart diffuser (200), which is input from a user and comprises at least one of a home mode, a hotel mode, an office mode, a lounge mode, a conference room mode, a sleep mode, and a ventilation mode, and oil combination information on oils contained in the plurality of oil cartridges (CA). 4. The method of claim 3, wherein the oil combination information is transmitted from the smart diffuser (200) or input from the user. 5. The method of any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein the smart diffuser (200) comprises: a frame (210) configured to define a diffusing position (DP); a container (220) mounted on the frame (210) and comprising a space (H) configured to mount a plurality of oil cartridges (CA) therein; and a control unit (230) configured to control a corresponding cartridge (CA) among the plurality of oil cartridges (CA) to enter the diffusing position (DP) by driving the container (220) based on the mode selection signal transmitted to the smart diffuser (200). 6. The method of claim 5, wherein the frame (210) comprises a fan (FN), which is located directly above the diffusing position (DP) and configured to draw out a fragrance of an oil cartridge (CA), which has entered the diffusing position (DP), and the control unit (230) controls an operation of the fan (FN) based on the mode selection signal transmitted to the smart diffuser (200). 7. The method of claim 5 or 6, wherein the container (220) is rotatably mounted on the frame (210), and the control unit (230) rotates the container (220) so as to cause the selected cartridge (CA) to enter the diffusing position (DP). 8. A terminal (100) connected to a smart diffuser (200) via a network so as to operate the smart diffuser (200), the terminal (100) comprising: a mode selection signal generation unit (110) configured to generate a mode selection signal comprising operation information on a plurality of oil cartridges (CA) mounted in the smart diffuser (200), wherein the operation information comprises at least one of an operation order, an operation duration, a fragrance emission intensity, and an operation time zone of each of the cartridges (CA); and a communication unit (120) configured to transmit the mode selection signal to the smart diffuser (200).
